compiled_state.title: Implement run-skill-evals.sh orchestrator with Tier 1 and Tier 2 modes
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Build the run-skill-evals.sh orchestrator that runs promptfoo evals for skills.

## CLI Contract
- Tier 1: run-skill-evals.sh <path1> [path2 ...] — maps changed file paths to parent skill dirs, finds evals/promptfooconfig.yaml, invokes npx promptfoo eval --config <path> for each
- Tier 2: run-skill-evals.sh --all — discovers all evals/promptfooconfig.yaml under plugins/dso/skills/, runs full suite, outputs promptfoo native JSON results to stdout
- Exit codes: 0 = all pass, 1 = any failure, 2 = npx/promptfoo not available
- Graceful failure: check command -v npx before running, exit 2 with helpful message if missing

## Implementation Details
- Script location: plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh
- Tier 1 path mapping: for each changed path, extract the skill directory (plugins/dso/skills/<name>/), check for evals/promptfooconfig.yaml, run if found, skip if not
- Tier 2 discovery: find plugins/dso/skills/*/evals/promptfooconfig.yaml
- Grader model convention: Haiku default is set via defaultTest.options.provider in each promptfooconfig.yaml (per-eval config, not hardcoded in the script). Script passes configs through without modifying grader settings.
- Include script header documentation: usage, exit codes, output format, grader convention

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Script exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh
- [ ] Script outputs usage on --help
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh --help 2>&1 | grep -q 'Usage'
- [ ] Script exits 2 with message when npx is not available
  Verify: PATH=/usr/bin bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh --all 2>&1; test $? -eq 2
- [ ] RED tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-run-skill-evals.sh
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh (create)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: plugins/dso/scripts/run-skill-evals.sh. Tests: 17/17 GREEN.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
